name: senna-whisper
prompt: Close-up. Red-haired woman's face very close to frame, lidded green bedroom eyes, full lips parted near unseen ear. Heat-shimmer aura around her. Seductive predatory expression, possessive hunger. Morning light from left. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Senna
dialogue.text: You're so cold this morning. Let me warm you up.

name: rei-profile-frost
prompt: Close-up profile. Silver-haired woman, ice-blue eyes staring straight ahead, expression utterly composed and neutral. Crystalline earring visible in left ear with frost spreading across its surface. Cold blue ambient lighting. Controlled, untouchable. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: rei-deflects
prompt: Medium close-up. Silver-haired woman in pristine academy uniform buttoned to collar. Expression neutral, slightly dismissive. Crystalline earring with frost patterns visible. Cold blue lighting. Controlled distance. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: senna-hand-chest
prompt: Close-up. Feminine hand with red nails placed on white uniform shoulder, heat-shimmer emanating from the fingertips. Possessive gesture. Warm amber glow from hand against cool blue fabric. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style
